settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage storage and backups
settings.backups_subtitle: Back up your sessions and restore them later.
settings.storage_subtitle: See usage and enable persistent storage.

landing.hero_subtitle: Track every fishing session, know the law for each canton, and log your catches — all in one app.
landing.features_title: Everything you need on the water
landing.feature_laws_desc: Select any point on the map and instantly see the fishing laws, permit requirements, and minimum catch sizes for that Swiss canton.
landing.feature_sessions_desc: Log fishing sessions with weather and water conditions. Track your progress over time — like Strava does for cycling and running.
landing.feature_catches_desc: Record every catch with species, length, weight, and release status. Build your complete fishing history across all sessions.
landing.feature_data_desc: All data stays on your device. Export your fishing history and import it again on any device.
landing.cantons_desc: Complete fishing regulations for every canton — from Zurich to Ticino.

map.click_instruction: Click on the map to select your fishing location
map.not_switzerland: Swiss canton laws are unavailable for this location.
map.not_switzerland_hint: Use the research prompt below to look up local fishing rules and official sources.

sessions.title: Fishing Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Track your fishing trips, conditions, and catches.
sessions.no_sessions_desc: Start a new session to begin tracking your fishing adventures!

new_session.title: Start New Fishing Session
new_session.notes_placeholder: General notes about this fishing session…

catch.title: Catches
catch.no_catches: No catches logged yet. Click "Log Catch" to add one.

recognition.low_confidence: Low confidence — please confirm species manually
recognition.override_hint: You can override the suggested species before saving.
recognition.error_unsupported_format: Unsupported image format. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
recognition.error_image_too_large: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
recognition.error_malformed_image: Image could not be processed. Please try another photo.
recognition.error_out_of_memory: Not enough memory to process this image on this device.
recognition.error_processing_failed: Species recognition failed. Please select species manually.

catch.gps_unavailable: GPS not available on this device.

data.title: Data Management
data.import_confirm: This will replace all current data. Are you sure?
data.export_tooltip: Download all your fishing data as ZIP backup
data.import_tooltip: Restore data from a previous export

storage.quota_exceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Remove some photos or export/delete old sessions to free space.
storage.persistence_failed: Could not enable persistent storage on this browser.
storage.persistence_disable_not_supported: Disabling persistent storage is not supported by browsers once enabled.
storage.v2_requires_zip: This backup requires importing the ZIP file, not manifest.json directly.

regulation.start_review_desc: Regulation information is saved with every session. Use information mode by default, or enable strict mode if you want confirmation before starting.
regulation.no_sources: No cantonal source links are available for this position.
regulation.no_sources_outside_switzerland: No Swiss canton source links are available for this position because it is outside Switzerland.
regulation.confirm_label: I understand and have checked the official source before continuing.
regulation.change_notification_desc: You may have entered a different regulation area. Current session rules may no longer apply. Review the new source-backed information before continuing.
regulation.confirmed_uncertain_desc: This session was started after you confirmed that you checked the official source despite incomplete or stale in-app data.
regulation.select_location_first: Select your fishing position first so the regulation information can be saved with the session.
regulation.information_mode_desc: Information mode: save the regulation context and let me decide how to use it.
regulation.strict_mode_desc: Strict mode: require explicit confirmation before starting or continuing after regulation changes.
regulation.research_prompt_desc: Paste this into your preferred LLM or web search, then verify the answer with official local sources.
regulation.research_prompt_template: What recreational fishing laws, permits, size limits, closed seasons, protected species, gear restrictions, catch quotas, and water-specific local rules apply near {{location}} in {{country}} (coordinates {{lat}}, {{lng}})? Please cite official national, regional, and local authority sources, note whether rules differ by water body or permit area, and highlight the most important rules an angler must verify before fishing there.
regulation.info_notification_desc: Your position may have entered a different regulation area. The new source-backed information was saved as an additional session checkpoint.

laws.overview_subtitle: Browse fishing regulations for all 26 Swiss cantons. Click a canton to expand its details.
laws.stale_warning: This information may be outdated. Please verify with the official cantonal authority before fishing.
laws.disclaimer: For information only. Always verify current regulations with the official cantonal authority before fishing.
